name: @sfmapi/client
description: Typed TypeScript SDK for sfmapi (browser + Node).

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/_generated/client.ts src/errors.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --sourcemap --clean --splitting && node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('dist/_generated',{recursive:true});require('node:fs').copyFileSync('src/_generated/openapi.d.ts','dist/_generated/openapi.d.ts')" && node --input-type=module -e "const [r,g,cr,cg]=await Promise.all([import('./dist/index.js'),import('./dist/_generated/client.js'),import('./dist/index.cjs'),import('./dist/_generated/client.cjs')]);const e=g.buildSfmApiError(404,{detail:'missing'});if(r.SfmApiError!==g.SfmApiError||!(e instanceof r.SfmApiError))throw new Error('ESM root/generated SfmApiError identity split');const ce=cg.buildSfmApiError(404,{detail:'missing'});if(cr.SfmApiError!==cg.SfmApiError||!(ce instanceof cr.SfmApiError))throw new Error('CJS root/generated SfmApiError identity split');"
